body:
Don't forget to dress your chairs. ‚ú® Bows, tassels, and wreaths galore turn simple chairbacks into festive delights. Visit the link in our profile to see all the ways you can dress your holiday chair. #serenaandlily

How to attach tassels to bar stools:
1 - Start by creating a small hook out of floral wire or any kind of flexible wire (twist ties are another option).
2 - Thread the wire hook through the woven back.
3 - Insert the tassel string and twist the wire to secure.
4 - Thread the wire back into the chair to conceal any loose edges.

body:
Can‚Äôt decide? See below for details on why we love our Portside and Balboa Counter Stools. #serenaandlily

Option 1: Balboa Counter Stool
- Frame is handcrafted of solid mahogany and hand-wrapped with rattan.
- Legs are detailed with brass end caps.
- Distinct undertones ‚Äî from blond to amber to earth ‚Äî build character across the Balboa collection.
- Cushion cover has a silicone grip on the bottom to secure the cushion in place. Cover is also removable for easy care and maintenance.
- Perennials Performance Basketweave fabrics have a refined weave and are designed to repel water, as well as resist mold, mildew, and staining. They are guaranteed to resist fading for 3 years.
- Additional cushions are available so you can mix things up whenever you like.

Option 2: Portside Counter Stool
- Handcrafted solid ash frame with an earth-toned finish.
- Hand-wrapped seagrass seat and back.
- Seagrass has natural variations in tone, making each piece unique.
- As seagrass ages, it will take on a more muted shade for that lived-in look we love.
